contents: {a=Person_WillemDafoe}Willem Dafoe{a}, {a=Person_JudyWithdabooty}Judy Withdabooty{a}, and {a=Person_Crow}Crow{a} signed a movie contract to star in the next movie produced by {a=Person_Mikhail}Mikhail (Heavy Weapons Guy){a}. This movie was called {a=Media_AudienceAnarchy}Audience Anarchy{a}: A movie about a board meeting where Judy Withdabooty pitch movie ideas to Willem Dafoe and Crow plays as {a=Peopla_DannyDevito}Danny De'vito{a}. The movie would later open with scathing reviews and scroe 23% on {a=App_RottenTomatoes}Rotten Tomatoes{a}.

{a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} was accused of public indecency by ejaculating at {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville Town Centre{a}. This could threaten their future career of Craig Milking. Their lawyer, {a=Person_DualMoodman}Dual Moodman{a}, proved that they were innocent: He pointed out that they were actually pretending to be a Cutie Craigy Eggy. Aheko couldn't have been ejaculating if they were pretending to be a Cutie Craigy Eggy. So the case quickly ended there and they were deemed innocent by the jury.

{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} releases {a=Person_Lynx10InchNutCruncher}Lynx's 10 Inch Nut Cruncher{a}, for parents who have out-of-control children and IPad kids. Just point it at their eyes and squeeze. However, the product may cause the following:

Agent {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} assigned tranee {a=Person_AssFloppyEggplant}Chappie{a} to a practice mission. They were tasked to steal a Cloaca from {a=Location_TheGarbageStore}the Garbagé store{a}. Nova partnered them up with veteran agent {a=Person_AssFloppyEggplant}"Crusty" Ass Floppy Eggplant{a} to help train them. Back in 1962, he successfully stole the {a=Object_SuperSlushie}Super Slushie{a} from the Facebook marketplace. Chappie ran into a nearby alley, trying to uncanny can and do a boogie. They then ran into the Garbagé store, tripped on their ass, and was quickly shot 67 times by security. The mission was quickly declared a failure and Chappie was immediately exiled.

header: Opening of Nova's Electronics Jizz and Bendy Bits
contents: {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} opened their own hardware store called {a=Location_NovaElectronicsJizzAndBendyBits}Nova's Electronics Jizz and Bendy Bits{a}. They sell a diverse range of products for all needs - from Flex Tape, to personal massagers, to the {a=Product_NovaBox960}Nova Box 960{a}. The store, however, does not sell crotches. Currently, the only hired clerk is {a=Person_ThunderbirdRed}Thunderbird Red{a}.

{a=Person_HatsuneMiku}Hatsune Miku{a} tried to create a robot servant called the {a=Product_WifesBestFriend}Wife's Best Friend{a}. It was meant to do many things - from cock hardening, to foot licking, and tucking your kids in at night. But, due to the numerous technical issues, the product was never released. It was especially catastrophic during the filming of it's commercial. When commanded to clean a pair of socks, its code started breaking down. It began filling the studio with deadly neurotoxins. Hatsune Miku quickly rebooted it and solved the problem. But it didn't ended there. It start brandishing a chainsaw around the stage. It then told Miku "Your time is up. You must now face the consequences" and tried to take it from behind. The staff eventually managed to shut it down and, thankfully, no one got hurt.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} got a job as a security guard at {a=Location_FreddyFazbearPizza}Freddy Fazbear's Pizza{a}. He didn't want to be alone so he secured a deal to bring a friend with him to work. He chose to take {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} with him. On their first night, instead of facing up against the animatronics, they found themselves defending the building against hoards of zombies. They could only last for 13 nights, before complaining to their employer for not specifying this in the job description. The job then quickly escalated into a dimensional collapse, solely contained within the local area.

After the closure of {a=Organisation_WWYNATC}Why Wouldn't You Need A Therapy Call{a}, {a=Person_Rick}Rick{a} tries openning a pet store called {a=Location_JurrasicCraigPark}Jurrasic Craig Park{a}. A frequent customer of his, {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a}, buys goldfish for one soul each every sunday, to feed their pet bunny called {a=Person_JowBeanieTheDrippyDuck}Jow Beanie the Drippy Duck{a}. Rick has been extorting more and more them each time to afford a photo of Taylor Swift.

After leaving {a=Location_FreddyFazbearPizza}Freddy Fazbear's Pizza{a}, {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} began another round of job hunting. He initially looked at {a=Organisation_Sidemen}the Sidemen{a}, but declined after finding out they had plans to milk {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} for their transforming venom. He also found that their rival company, {a=Organisation_MikeOxlong}Mike Oxlong{a}, has better pay. He couldn't get employment there as they did not like that he brought his Tamigotchi to the interview.

{a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} Invited {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} to a date at {a=Location_HearAttackGrillNo67}Heart Attack Grill No. 67{a}. Craig ordered a Dr Pepper and {a=Product_HorseAss}Horse Ass{a}. Ritikl ordered a Dr Pepper a deep-fried {a=Product_TokxiBurritoBurger}Tokxi's Burrito Burger{a} with {a=Product_CraigSauce}Craig Sauce{a}, extra batter, and steak grease. Craig was a little disgusted with Ritikl's order and vomited onto the floor beside her. After Ritikl past out from eating his meal and the bill totaled 2 shmickles, Craig left him and blocked his number. Ritikl woke up 5 hours later and discovered that they were tied to their chair. {a=Person_NovaDante}A Nova clone{a} then arrived and proceeded to violate them.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig's{a} toilet from {a=Location_CraigManor}Craig Manor{a} was being auctioned off, after he contracted {a=Disease_CraigMorphSyndrome}Craig Morph Syndrome{a} from it. {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} wanted it gone, after it began following them and made them afraid that they'll get infected as well. Unfortunately, no one wanted to take the toilet and Aheko succumb to the disease. The toilet then disappeared without a trace, leaving everyone confused and concerned.

{a=Organisation_TheChallengedGooners}The Challenged Gooners{a} have setup a new {a=Location_ChallengedGoonersHeadquarters}headquarters{a} next to a {a=Location_McCraigyBurgerBar}Mc Craigy's Burger Bar{a} in {a=Location_Craigville}Craigville{a}. They are on a mission to hunt down and kill {a=Person_QueenPoppetDragon}queen Poppet Dragon{a} and their {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} clone minion. This was fortold in a prophecy by {a=Person_BuddhaVanBooker}Buddha Van Booker{a}, the wise elder of the Challenged Gooners:
"If Poppet Dragon continues down this rabbit hole, then someone will stop them."
It was never confirmed who will stop them or how. But, a similar prediction was made about {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a} and they were hit by a falling piano.

{a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl's{a} Russian cousin, {a=Person_Ruben}Ruben{a}, moved to Craigville to become a doctor. Their first patient was {a=Person_JoeBeanie}Joe Beanie{a}. Him and his friend assumed he was just being horny. But it turned out he had an extra appendix and it had swolen. The symptoms also include the paws feeling like they are covered in Bad Dragon cum lube and restricted blood flow. Beanie had contracted a case of {a=Disease_FemboiNovaSyndrome}Femboi Nova Syndrome{a}. Ruben quickly grabbed their Wolverine adamantium claws to surgically remove the extra appendix. Beanie's friend questioned the state of Ruben's medical license and He confirmed that he does not have one. Beanie immediately lost trust in him and ran back home, to watch {a=Media_LynxTailCrackers}Lynx's Tail Crackers{a} doing an event based around {a=Media_BigBongTheory}The Big Bong Theory{a}.

{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} and an undercover police officer get recruited by {a=Person_Pixel}Pixel{a} to work in {a=Location_SuperiorQuackanoodle}Superior Quackanoodle{a}. It is a business in {a=Location_CreampieTown}Creampie Town{a}, owned by {a=Organisation_GambinoFamily}the Gambino family{a}. They deal with milking Lynx out of season and money laundering. The boss made them pledge there loyalty and go on a test run to see if they can handle it. After the test, the cop was killed as they discovered that they were a "dirty fennec", for they knew about {a=Person_FatTony}Fat Tony{a} before they before joining the family. Fat Tony was a previous member who was ass paddled after being ratted out as another "dirty fennec". In the end, Lynx was accepted into the mob and immediatly tasked to eat the cop.

Whilst {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} was sulking in front of the tv after their break up with {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a}, they received a {a=Product_MagicCuckChair}Magic Cuck Chair{a} in the mail. They were pretty confused by its existence and who sent it. When opening the package, a wish-granting bear appeared in the living room. Ritikl wished for hmemade fod. The bear then began arguing about how they could have wished for something else, like money or for Craig to come back. The bear reluctantly accepted the wish and began summoning hmemade fod. But, Ritikl interupted the bear's magic to instead wish for {a=Product_HorseAss}Horse Ass{a}. The bear got furious with them and decided to leave.

{a=Person_JizzJuggler}Jizz Juggler{a}, known as Bear_4284 on Twitch, was arrested for extreme piracy. They were streaming {a=Media_DiscordModSimulator}Discord Mod Simulator{a} for the {a=Product_NovaBox960}Nova Box 960{a}. Johnson Fister called for V1 to apprahend Jizz Juggler. They have illegally downloaded a {a=Product_LynxMilkerWithEggMaker}Lynx Milker with Egg Maker{a}, a papagen, and a tuktuk. V1 grabbed Jizz Juggler by the neck and dragged him off-screen.
